narrative: Three records in one day — and the bridge crossed half a million WPRL minted. PRL slid -2.95% to $0.7706 on $87.6k volume across six pairs, but spot price hardly matters next to the flow: custody jumped +22,436 PRL to 509,809 (+4.6%, biggest 24h inbound tracked) and minted WPRL +21,429 to 505,638, the first time supply has cleared the 500k mark. Surplus nearly doubled to 1.14% (5,763 PRL) as deposits ran ahead of mint settlement — the same in-flight gap (~1.6k PRL) we saw on June 2nd is back. Network hashrate ripped to a fresh ATH of 35.55 EH/s (+49% in 24h) even as MinePRL pool GPUs drifted 26 → 21, pulling pool share to ~0.008% — the third straight day of capacity landing outside the pool. Core repo pearl-research-labs/pearl picked up another +8 stars to 195, extending the attention run that started yesterday.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.height, network.block_reward_prl for circulating supply approximation)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: Custody +22,436 PRL in 24h to 509,809 — biggest 24h inbound tracked; minted WPRL +21,429 to 505,638, crossing 500k for the first time.
Surplus widened 0.65% → 1.14% (5,763 PRL) as deposits outpaced mint settlement.
/api/supply (505,638.09 PRL) leads /api/custody totalSupplyGrains (504,046.09 PRL) by ~1,592 PRL — same in-flight mint signature as 2026-06-02, persistent across two reads.
Network hashrate +49% to 35.55 EH/s — fresh chain ATH — while MinePRL pool GPUs 26 → 21 pulled pool share to ~0.008%. Third straight day of network capacity growing outside the pool.

social.summary: No coordinated narrative push around the 500k WPRL milestone or the new hashrate ATH; @prlnet and @pearlbridgexyz feeds stayed quiet. Attention continues to land quietly on GitHub — pearl-research-labs/pearl +8 stars to 195 in 24h, second straight day of meaningful star inflow.

docs: tidy mirror references and audit attributions
fix(rpc): use chain.IsCurrent for getblocktemplate IBD check (#125)
